output.answer: The Phantom of the Opera opened on 1986-01-01.
output.formatted:
The Phantom of the Opera opened on 1986-01-01.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?openingDate WHERE {
  wd:Q1157267 wdt:P577 ?openingDate .
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| openingDate                         |
| ----------------------------------- |
| 1986-01-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
